expectations.text: Response references actual task titles from the vault (not invented examples)
expectations.evidence: Lists PT-3898, PT-3562, draft message to parents, Kirkwood Eye Center — all real notes

expectations.text: Response focuses on hot and/or spicy priority tasks, not normal/bland ones
expectations.evidence: All suggestions are hot or spicy; explicitly noted what to skip

expectations.text: Response gives a concise list (not an exhaustive dump of every task)
expectations.evidence: 4-item list with time estimates and a 'what to skip' section

expectations.text: Response gives enough context per task to be useful — not just bare task titles
expectations.evidence: Each item has time estimate, why it matters, and next action — very actionable
